note: TM is instance-specific. All files use tm_{id} naming. Copy and rename before use.

code_package.description: TM submits completed code to SPM for CR review (CPK)

acceptance_criteria: Verbatim from CAG — every criterion listed
fields.implementation_summary: What was built, key decisions made, any deviations from naive interpretation of the spec and why
fields.known_limitations: Any known edge cases not covered, or empty string

findings_addressed: List of CR findings and how each was fixed

status_report.description: TM reports status or asks questions to SPM (SRP)

fields.task_id: Task ID this report relates to, or empty string
fields.message: Full description of status, question, or issue

questions.question: Specific question requiring SPM answer before work can continue

fields.block_reason: If report_type is block: specific reason for blockage

convention_request_to_spm.description: TM raises uncovered situation to SPM (CVR) — SPM forwards to PM if needed

fields.subject: One line description of the uncovered situation
fields.situation: Full description of what was encountered
fields.proposed_convention: What convention the TM proposes to adopt
fields.blocking_task: Task ID blocked by this gap, or empty string
